title: SHE key_id is untyped u8 while all other IDs use typed wrappers
description: All wolfHSM NVM and key identifiers in this crate use typed newtypes: NvmId(u16), KeyId(u16), UserId(u16). SHE key slot identifiers are passed as bare u8 throughout she.rs (she_enc_ecb, she_dec_ecb, she_enc_cbc, she_dec_cbc, she_generate_mac, she_verify_mac). A user mixing SHE key slots with NVM IDs gets no compile-time type check. A contributor adding new SHE functions will copy u8 without questioning whether that is intentional design or an oversight, entrenching the inconsistency further.
